title: One Tap Away (Riverboat Bad Boys Remix)

style.styleSentence: A gritty hardcore gangsta rap track running at a mid-tempo 95 BPM that fuses grimy 90s East Coast boom bap drums with dusty upright bass stabs and sinister piano loops to create a black-and-white 1928 riverboat noir atmosphere, featuring raspy aggressive male vocals over an instrumentation palette of muted trumpets, creepy xylophone hits, vinyl hiss, and foghorn-like low-end frequencies.
style.vocalStyle: raspy street delivery with call-and-response ad-libs

sections.raw: strummed acoustic guitar, punchy kick drum

sections.text:
Ads in the cracks, brands in the chat
Everybody got stats, everybody wants claps
Everybody got reach but don't reach back
How we got this close and lost contact?

You can see me in a second
You can call me any day
You can love me in private
But scroll right past my name
Funny how we got connected
Then forgot how to stay
You're right there in my pocket
But you feel a world away

One tap away (one tap away)
From a real conversation but we don't say a thing
We're one tap away
From "I see you keep going" from "I'm proud of your dream"
Save your likes for the strangers
Save your hearts for the stars
But the ones who really know you act like loving you is hard
One tap away
So why do I feel alone in a room full of names?

Tap, tap, but you don't reach back
Heart, heart, but it don't feel like that
Close, close, close, but we don't connect
One tap away and we still forget

Click, click, click, everybody got a new rule
Don't hype friends that ain't cool, cool
Save that love for the big names
Blue checks, big chains, big views
That if a stranger blow up overnight
Everybody's where they saw the light
Same ones quiet when you need a find
Now they in the comments like "that's my guy"

sections.raw: drums drop out, fading acoustic guitar
sections.text:
One tap away
And still so far
Everybody online
Nobody where you are
